original_image_tags: A typed, dark-colored form or card with white text, titled "RESTRICTED" at the top and bottom. The form is a numbered checklist from 1 to 26 for reporting unidentified flying objects. The text is slightly grainy. Two hole-punch circles are visible on the left edge. Handwritten notes are present in the right margin.

elements.description: The page contains two stamped 'RESTRICTED' markings with bullet points at the top and bottom. There is also handwritten text on the right side and at the bottom right corner. The rest of the page consists of typed text filling out a 'CHECK-LIST - UNIDENTIFIED FLYING OBJECTS' form. No photographs, sketches, diagrams, or other graphical content are present.
